entries.value: Arthur Whetsel(t); Otto Hardwick(sax); Duke Ellington(p); Elmer Snowden(bj); possibly Sonny Greer(d).

entries.content: The piece was rejected, the wax master destroyed and no metal part nor test pressing was issued. Victor's file entry for this session omits names of players, recalled by Elmer Snowden's as the original Washingtonians: Whetsel, Hardwick, Ellington, Snowden and Greer (but Greer didn't confirm his presence). It is not known which saxophone Hardwick played, and possibly Snowden also dubbed sax. More details in Steven Lasker's contribution on [DEMS Bulletin 96/2 p.7](http://tdwaw.ellingtonweb.ca/DEMS/DEMS1996-2.pdf)
